steps.title: Anesthetize the animals, harvest tissue and dissect the 4mm punch
steps.instruction: Anesthetize the animals, harvest tissue and dissect the 4mm punch.

steps.title: Hold the tissue in the forceps...
steps.instruction: Hold the tissue in the forceps and rinse it quickly in HBSS/PBS.

steps.title: Transfer it into the freshly labelled 1
steps.instruction: Transfer it into the freshly labelled 1.5ml Eppendorf tube and snap freeze in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Transport to lab and store it...
steps.instruction: Transport to lab and store it at -80°C freeze for further use.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: Before starting, set the centrifuge at 4°C.

steps.title: The collected tissue is taken out...
steps.instruction: The collected tissue is taken out of -80°C freeze and kept in ice bucket.

steps.title: Add 200-400ul of cold protein extraction buffer per sample
steps.instruction: Add 200-400ul of cold protein extraction buffer per sample.

steps.title: Cold Extraction buffer
steps.instruction: Cold Extraction buffer: In 1ml of RIPA buffer, freshly add 10ul each of protease inhibitor cocktail, Na-orthovanadate and PMSF.

steps.title: Use the manual homogenizer to dislodge the tissue (10-15 times)
steps.instruction: Use the manual homogenizer to dislodge the tissue (10-15 times). Put it back in ice.

steps.title: Homogenize the dislodged tissue using sonicator
steps.instruction: Homogenize the dislodged tissue using sonicator.

steps.title: You require 1, 15ml falcon of...
steps.instruction: You require 1, 15ml falcon of DI water and 1, 15ml falcon of 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Conditions on sonicator machine
steps.instruction: Conditions on sonicator machine: Pulse-Continues, Control cycle-4 and duty cycle-40%.

steps.title: First wash the sonicator twice with...
steps.instruction: First wash the sonicator twice with 70% ethanol (10 sec each) followed by twice with DI water (10 sec each).

steps.title: Now sonicate your protein sample-3 times...
steps.instruction: Now sonicate your protein sample-3 times with 20-25 sec pulse followed by 30 sec in ice.

steps.title: In between the samples, wash the...
steps.instruction: In between the samples, wash the sonicator with water followed by 70% ethanol for 5 sec each.

steps.title: After finishing extracting protein from all...
steps.instruction: After finishing extracting protein from all the samples, clean the sonicator by twice with DI water (10 sec each) followed by twice with 70% ethanol (10 sec each).

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 13,000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 13,000 rpm for 15 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Collect the supernatant in freshly labelled 1
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant in freshly labelled 1.5ml Eppendorf tubes. From here, either store it at -80°C freeze for further use or go for protein quantification.

steps.title: We will take 96-well plate and...
steps.instruction: We will take 96-well plate and add different concentrations of BSA standards (2.5ug, 5ug, 10ug, 20ug and 40ug).

steps.title: The protein samples will be loaded...
steps.instruction: The protein samples will be loaded as 2ul or 5ul/well in triplicates.

steps.title: Now add 100ul of BSA reagent in each well
steps.instruction: Now add 100ul of BSA reagent in each well.

steps.title: Go for plate reading according to...
steps.instruction: Go for plate reading according to their saved protein estimation protocol.

steps.title: The estimated protein will be calculated...
steps.instruction: The estimated protein will be calculated and used accordingly for western blot.
